zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Cormeilles於大約1157年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾塔林頓時，他的父親Richard de Cormeilles11155歲，母親Beatrice FitzRobert Camerarius13歲。他於1180年之後與Aubreda Marmion在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1204年在英國賀福爾索萊爾 霍普享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Cormeilles was born about 1157, in Tarrington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard de Cormeilles, was 11155 and his mother, Beatrice FitzRobert Camerarius, was 13. He married Aubreda Marmion after 1180, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in 1204, in Sollers Hope, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Cormeilles est né environ 1157, à Tarrington, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Cormeilles, avait 11155 ans et sa mère, Beatrice FitzRobert Camerarius, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Aubreda Marmion après 1180, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1204, à Sollers Hope, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Cormeilles um 1157 in Tarrington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Cormeilles 11155 und seine Mutter Beatrice FitzRobert Camerarius 13. Er hat nach 1180 in England, United Kingdom Aubreda Marmion geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb 1204 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Sollers Hope, Herefordshire, England.

Lui sposato Aubreda Marmion dopo il 1180, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1204, nel Sollers Hope, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Cormeillesが約1157年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアターリントンで生まれた時，父Richard de Cormeillesは11155歳，母Beatrice FitzRobert Camerariusは13歳であった。1180年以後にイギリスイギリスでAubreda Marmionと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1204年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアソラーズ ホーペで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Cormeilles(이)가 대략 1157년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 터아링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Cormeilles(은)는 11155세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice FitzRobert Camerarius(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1180년 이후 영국 잉글랜드에서 Aubreda Marmion(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1204년 영국 허퍼드실르 솔레르스 홉에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Cormeilles nasceu aproximadamente 1157, em Tarrington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Cormeilles, tinha 11155 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice FitzRobert Camerarius, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Aubreda Marmion após 1180, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1204, em Sollers Hope, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Cormeilles родился около 1157 г. в местности таррингтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard de Cormeilles было 11155 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice FitzRobert Camerarius, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Aubreda Marmion после 1180 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в 1204 г. в местности соллирс хоп, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

Se casó con Aubreda Marmion después de 1180, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1204, en Sollers Hope, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
